title: Daily Standup — Week 02 (12 weeks ago / baseline)

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Good morning everyone! Happy new sprint. We're in great shape going into Q1. Ivan, you want to kick us off?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Morning! Yes, good week. Yesterday I finished the auth module v2 refactor — finally got the token handling cleaned up properly. Co-authored with Maria, she had great ideas on the validation layer. Tom, that unblocks TASK-5 for you.

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: Awesome! That's exactly what I needed. I can start on the rate limiting design today.

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Also — I've been thinking about the bus factor on auth. I should document the session lifecycle properly so anyone on the team could jump in if needed. I'll schedule a knowledge sharing session for next Wednesday if people are interested.

utterances.speaker: maria
utterances.text: Very interested. I want to make sure I can cover during your vacation in March.

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Exactly. Let me draft the agenda today. Peter, I know you've been wanting to understand the test gaps — this would be perfect.

utterances.speaker: peter
utterances.text: Definitely joining. I noticed test coverage on session.py is only 55% — after the knowledge share I could write the missing tests.

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: That would be amazing. Tom, you should join too — the more people who understand auth, the better for all of us.

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: Blocked it in the calendar. Thanks Ivan.

utterances.speaker: maria
utterances.text: My update: merged the DB migration for the new schema. Clean deploy, zero issues. Now I'm moving to the Teams API which should be straightforward. Ivan, quick question — does auth check team membership or is that downstream?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Downstream — auth only validates identity, authorization is in the permissions module. But permissions checks team membership, so you'll call permissions.check_team_access(). Happy to show you the interface.

utterances.speaker: maria
utterances.text: That's exactly what I needed. 5 min after standup?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Sure.

utterances.speaker: anna
utterances.text: Frontend: graph view is getting really polished. Added the force simulation tuning Maria requested. Also — I have a proposal for improving the insight panel layout, want to do a quick design review with marina today?

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: 3pm works for me. Looking forward to it!

utterances.speaker: anna
utterances.text: Great. Also working on ActionButtons — hoping to demo the full connected flow by Thursday.

utterances.speaker: peter
utterances.text: QA: smoke tests are green. Also added integration test for the new pagination endpoint — Tom, your TASK-8 tests cover the edge cases well. One thing — the test fixture for auth tokens expires too quickly, causes flaky tests. Can we extend TTL in test config?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Good catch. I'll add a TEST_TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS env var today. Just set it to 3600 in .env.test.

utterances.speaker: peter
utterances.text: Perfect, that solves it.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Great team sync. Ivan — the auth knowledge share idea is exactly the culture we want. Anyone else have something they should document?

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: I can document the validator design when the rate limiting is done. Maybe Q1 ends with our first proper runbook.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Love it. Let's make documentation a Q1 theme. Alright — have a great sprint everyone. See you tomorrow!

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Good luck everyone! Looking forward to a clean sprint.

metadata.notes: Baseline healthy standup. Ivan proactively identified bus factor risk and proposed knowledge sharing. High collaboration — Ivan co-authored with Maria, coordinating with Tom and Peter. Team morale high, positive sentiment across all participants.
